# Minor Water Elemental

## Tier 1 Support

A living surge of seawater formed amidst the storm.

**Motives & Tactics:** Disperse, destabilize, overwhelm

> Difficulty: 11 | Thresholds: 6/10 | HP: 5 | Stress 5
> ATK: +1 | Crashing Wave: Very Close | 1d6+2 mag

## Features

**Rushing Water - Action:** Mark a Stress to attack a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d4+2 physical damage and the target becomes Vulnerable until the end of their next action.

**Surging Tide - Action:** Spend a Fear to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Elemental succeeds against are knocked back to Close range.

> **Design notes:** This adversary was inspired by the _Greater Water Elemental_, from the [_Daggerheart System Reference Document_](https://www.daggerheart.com/srd/ "Daggerheart System Reference Document"), adapted into a smaller support-focused creature. Its mechanics were simplified to emphasize repositioning, vulnerability, and environmental pressure rather than raw damage output.
